description: Build Fairlight checkpoint 1: the CA+WA cohort, benchmark, resilience-gap, and confidence-tagging layer with fixed comparison outputs.
intent: Deliver a reproducible stage-1 checkpoint artifact that lets the team compare branch outputs on cohort quality, benchmark stability, sponsor fit, and interpretability before any stress-test or recommendation logic is added.
notes: Bootstrap exception replaced the placeholder task definition on an origin/main-aligned bootstrap branch. Build work happens on teammate feature branches, submissions are recorded from main via orchestrator commands, and all branch comparisons must use the fixed shared sample set.
acceptance_checks: Filtered checkpoint-1 panel keeps only CA and WA rows with submitted_on null.
Checkpoint-1 panel enforces one row per (ein, fiscal_year) after deterministic dedupe.
Every scoreable row emits size_bucket, cohort_level, cohort_key, cohort_size, and scoreability fields.
Resilient benchmark output records benchmark_rule, reference_org_count, and benchmark_status for each scored row.
Row-level resilience_gap is emitted whenever a valid resilient reference set exists.
data_confidence_tier, cohort_confidence_tier, and checkpoint1_confidence_tier are emitted for the stage-1 output.
A fixed shared-sample comparison table is produced for branch-to-branch checkpoint review.
A documented CLI command can regenerate the checkpoint-1 outputs from the checked-in contract.
